cards.back: The process of exchanging data between devices, using standardized protocols and standards
A collection of interconnected devices, such as computers, servers, and printers, that share resources and exchange data
A conceptual framework for understanding network communication, consisting of 7 layers: Physical, Data Link, Network, Transport, Session, Presentation, and Application
A simplified model of network communication, consisting of 4 layers: Network Access, Internet, Transport, and Application
The physical or logical arrangement of devices in a network, such as bus, star, ring, or mesh
